name: everything-evenhub
description: Official Even Hub development skills adapted for Codex, covering the complete Even G2 app lifecycle.

interface.shortDescription: Build, test, and package apps for Even G2 glasses.
interface.longDescription: Thirteen Even Hub skills for scaffolding, UI, input, device APIs, state, simulator testing, automation, measurement, packaging, and reference lookups.
defaultPrompt: Build a new Even G2 app and test it in the simulator.
Add glasses UI and touchpad controls to this Even Hub project.
Package this Even Hub app for device testing.
